info.title: Wasel Palestine API Documentation
info.description: API Documentation for Wasel Palestine backend project — smart mobility platform for checkpoints, incidents, crowdsourced reports, route estimation, and regional alerts.

description.example: Checkpoint is closed and cars are waiting.

get.summary: Test endpoint to verify the main app is working
get.description: Simple health check to confirm the Express app is mounted and responding.

get.summary: The generated Swagger documentation JSON file
get.description: Returns the raw OpenAPI 3.0 JSON specification used to power the Swagger UI.

get.summary: Health check endpoint to verify API is running
get.description: Returns the health status of the API and confirms the database connection is active.

post.description: Creates a new user account with name, email, password, and role.

400.description: User with this email already exists

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user.
Admin and Moderator retrieve a specific user's information by ID.

post.description: Admin creates a new user by specifying name, email, password, role, confidence score, activation status, and authorization status.

get.description: Admin and Moderator retrieve a list of all users in the system.

delete.description: Admin permanently deletes a user from the system.

post.description: Admin deactivates a user so they can no longer use any features of the system. Admins can deactivate citizens, moderators, and other admins.

message.example: Invalid user ID or user is already deactivated

example.message: Invalid user ID or user is already deactivated

post.description: Admin activates a user, restoring their ability to use the system. Admins can activate citizens, moderators, and other admins.

message.example: Invalid user ID or user is already active

example.message: Invalid user ID or user is already active
